skill.name: brandkit
skill.description: Premium brand-kit image generation skill for creating high-end brand-guidelines boards, logo systems, identity decks, and visual-world presentations. Trained for minimalist, cinematic, editorial, dark-tech, luxury, cultural, security, gaming, developer-tool, and consumer-app brand systems. Optimized for intentional logo concepting, refined composition, sparse typography, strong symbolic meaning, premium mockups, art-directed imagery, and flexible grid layouts.
skill.summary: Generates premium brand identity boards, logo systems, and presentation decks for any brand category.
skill.author: leonxlnx

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer detected 31 potential issues, but all are false positives. The SKILL.md file is 100% markdown design guidance for AI image generation with no executable code. Backtick patterns flagged as external_commands are markdown formatting for layout dimensions (e.g., `3 x 3`) and letter examples. Weak cryptographic algorithm and system reconnaissance flags all point to design terminology, not actual security threats. No prompt injection, code execution, network requests, file system access, or environment variable access was found. The skill is safe to publish.

medium_findings.title: External Commands (False Positive - Markdown Backticks)
medium_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged 12 instances of Ruby/shell backtick execution. All flagged patterns are markdown inline code formatting for layout dimensions (e.g., `3 x 3`, `2 x 3`, `4:3`, `16:10` at lines 78-90) and letter examples (e.g., `K`, `N`, `S`, `A` at lines 170-173). No shell execution is occurring.

medium_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm (False Positive - No Crypto Code)
medium_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged 10 instances of weak cryptographic algorithms. All flagged lines contain design guidance text: file description (line 3), system prompt (line 8), visual quality guidance (line 32), visual mode headings (line 339), and anti-generic design rules (lines 694, 702, 705, 711, 784). No cryptographic code or algorithm references exist in the file.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance (False Positive - Design Terminology)
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged 8 instances of system reconnaissance patterns. All flagged lines contain brand strategy and design terminology: file description (line 3), layout guidance (line 80), brand strategy thinking steps (lines 111, 119), visual design cues (lines 354, 404), reference extraction guidance (line 715), and prompt template layout options (line 750). No actual reconnaissance commands or techniques are present.

low_findings.title: Sensitive Data Reference (False Positive - No SAM Database)
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged a Windows SAM database reference at line 272. Line 272 contains the markdown heading '# DEFAULT 3 x 3 PANEL SYSTEM'. No mention of SAM database, Windows registry, or any sensitive system file exists anywhere in the file.

content.user_title: Generate Premium Brand Identity Kits and Logo Systems
content.value_statement: Creating professional brand identity boards requires design expertise most AI users lack. This skill generates premium brand-guidelines decks, logo systems, and identity presentations with intentional composition and refined visual quality.
actual_capabilities: Generate brand-kit overview images with structured grid layouts
Create professional logo concepts with symbolic meaning and construction logic
Design brand identity decks with multiple application panels
Apply consistent visual modes for different brand categories
Build coherent color systems with disciplined palettes
limitations: Cannot create actual vector logo files or deliverable design assets
Limited to image generation within the AI model capabilities
Cannot perform brand research or competitive market analysis
Logo outputs are conceptual and require professional refinement for production use

use_cases.title: Startup Brand Identity Exploration
use_cases.description: Generate a complete visual identity system for a new startup to present to stakeholders and investors.

use_cases.title: Client Brand Presentation Board
use_cases.description: Create professional brand-guidelines decks for design agency client pitches and project proposals.

use_cases.title: Product Brand Concept Testing
use_cases.description: Quickly visualize different brand directions for a product before investing in full design production.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Brand Kit Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a brand-kit image for my startup [NAME]. It is a [CATEGORY] product for [AUDIENCE]. Use the default 3x3 layout.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick brand identity exploration with default settings

prompt_templates.title: Visual Mode-Specific Brand Board
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a brand identity board for a [CATEGORY] tool called [NAME]. Use the [MODE] visual mode with dark charcoal canvas and restrained typography.
prompt_templates.scenario: Applying a specific visual style to match an industry

prompt_templates.title: Custom Layout Brand System
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a [LAYOUT] brand-kit board for [NAME]. Core metaphor is [METAPHOR]. Palette should be [COLORS]. Include logo cover, digital application, and tagline panels.
prompt_templates.scenario: Customizing the grid layout and brand direction

prompt_templates.title: Full Identity Deck with Strategy
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a complete brand identity presentation for [NAME]. Brand strategy: category=[CATEGORY], audience=[AUDIENCE], core metaphor=[METAPHOR]. Logo should combine monogram with meaning using negative space. Include construction geometry, color system, typography specimen, physical application, and image direction panels.
prompt_templates.scenario: Comprehensive brand identity design project with strategy

output_examples.input: Generate a brand-kit for CodeForge, a developer tool platform
output: A 3x3 dark-theme brand board with a cursor-frame logo mark, terminal window mockup, color swatches in cyan, charcoal, and coral, monospace typography specimen, and a "Build Better" tagline across a cinematic landscape panel.
The grid has strong gutters with a logo cover panel, digital application, brand essence tagline, color system, typography, physical badge mockup, image direction, and system detail sections.

output_examples.input: Create a luxury brand identity for Maison Verre, a perfume house
output: An ivory and deep blue presentation board with a geometric monogram logo, embossed seal mockup, serif type specimen, gold accent palette, fragrance bottle silhouette, and editorial-style atmospheric imagery.
The layout uses a restrained 2x3 format with large negative space, paper grain texture, and small page-number details throughout each panel.

output_examples.input: Design a security brand board for WatchTower, a compliance platform
output: A 2x3 navy and red brand deck featuring a shield-eye logo construction diagram, dashboard UI mockup with alert chips, radar-line accent pattern, threat-label tagline panel, and badge application mockup.
Visual cues include subtle motion traces, controlled gradients, and a dark editorial grid with serious, vigilant mood.

best_practices: Provide clear brand strategy details such as category, audience, and core metaphor before generating for more intentional results.
Match the visual mode to your brand industry for coherent design language and appropriate visual cues.
Use the same brand name, accent color, and logo concept across multiple generations to build consistent brand identity.
anti_patterns: Requesting a brand board without any brand context produces generic and unfocused design output.
Asking for too many panels or excessive text creates cluttered layouts with unreadable labels and poor composition.
Combining multiple conflicting visual modes in a single request results in an incoherent brand identity with mixed design signals.

faq.question: What file format does the skill output?
faq.answer: The skill generates images within the chat interface. It does not export files in external formats.

faq.question: Can I use the logos in my commercial project?
faq.answer: The generated logos are conceptual. You should have a professional designer refine them before commercial use.

faq.question: Does this skill work with any AI tool?
faq.answer: Yes, it works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code as listed in the supported tools.

faq.question: How many brand kits can I generate?
faq.answer: You can generate unlimited brand kits. Each conversation request produces one board at a time.

faq.question: Can I customize the layout and colors?
faq.answer: Yes. You can request specific grid layouts and color palettes in your prompt description.

faq.question: Does the skill create file deliverables?
faq.answer: No. The skill produces images only. Vector files, PDFs, and other deliverable formats are not supported.
